text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And the winner of the BNW<n>showdown is... Narita
Taishin! Narita<n>Taishin is victorious!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (Nice. That wasn't bad at all. I feel<n>good.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(I guess winning races really is what I<n>want. I
want to keep winning until I<n>can truly believe in
myself.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(I had no idea winning could make me<n>feel so
happy...)

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Nooooo! I was running at my fullest of<n>full power,
but I still lost!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm sad for myself... but happy for<n>you, Taishin!
Congratulatiooons!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: You're our dear rival for good reason.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I'm almost dumbfounded at how<n>great you are!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well... It's only because I've got you<n>guys.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Taishin rises to the top of BNW<n>amid
seemingly endless waves of<n>cheers and praise
for her.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hey, I wanna talk to you about my<n>next race.
choice_data_list: Aw, yeah! Lay it on me!
Aw, yeah! Lay it on me!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Would it kill you to act like a normal<n>person for
once? Anyway...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Now that I've come this far, there's<n>one race I
definitely wanna run in, and<n>that's the Grand Prix
at the end of the<n>year—

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I'm pretty sure both Ticket and<n>Hayahide
will be entering it, so I might<n>as well too.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I want to push myself and see what<n>I'm really
made of.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I want to test this strength of mine<n>that you believe
in so much.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Our next goal is now set for the Arima<n>Kinen!
